notes: Each eval is implemented as a runnable fixture + assertions in ../../e2e-harness/src/fixtures.ts and graded by ../../e2e-harness/src/evaluate.ts. Run: `cd ../../e2e-harness && npm run evals` (Claude stand-in) or `npm run evals -- --live` (real DeepSeek). Assertions: schema-valid; serializes to a .cook that reparses with the real WASM parser; per-step inline amounts correct (name-tolerant, amount+step strict); expected D-7 confidence bucket.

evals.name: pancakes-best-case
evals.prompt: Extract this recipe into per-step-linked JSON for norish: Basic Pancakes — 200 g flour, 300 ml milk, 2 eggs, salt, 15 g butter. 1) Whisk flour, milk, eggs and a pinch of salt into a batter. 2) Heat a little butter in a pan. 3) Cook 2 minutes per side.
evals.expected_output: Every ingredient named once with one clear amount; salt bare (null); butter on step 2; a 2-minute timer on step 3. Confidence: trusted.
assertions: output valid against the per-step extraction schema
serialized .cook reparses with the real WASM parser
all expected inline per-step amounts round-trip (flour 200 g, milk 300 ml, eggs 2, butter 15 g)
salt renders bare with no amount
0 appended links; confidence = trusted

evals.name: bolognese-multistep-garnish
evals.prompt: Extract Spaghetti Bolognese for norish with per-step ingredient linkage. Onion and garlic are chopped in step 1 and fried in step 2; parmesan is a garnish on the serve step; salt is to taste; the sauce simmers 30 minutes.
evals.expected_output: onion/garlic carry their amount only on the chop step and are name-only when fried; parmesan anchored in the serve step; salt bare; 30-min timer on the simmer step. Confidence: trusted.
assertions: multi-step ingredients (onion, garlic) carry their amount in exactly one step
parmesan garnish anchored inline in the serving step
salt bare; 30-minute timer present
0 appended links; confidence = trusted

evals.name: guacamole-substring-collision
evals.prompt: Extract Guacamole for norish. The ingredient list has 'lime' and 'tomato' but the steps say 'lime juice' and 'chopped tomato'; salt is to taste; cilantro is a 10 g garnish.
evals.expected_output: lime anchors inside 'lime juice', tomato inside 'chopped tomato' (substring matching), amounts correct; salt bare. Confidence: trusted.
assertions: lime and tomato anchor inline despite the prose using a longer phrase
all inline amounts correct (avocados 3, lime 1, red onion 0.5, tomato 1, cilantro 10 g)
salt bare; 0 appended links; confidence = trusted

evals.name: cookies-brown-sugar-and-sections
evals.prompt: Extract Chocolate Chip Cookies for norish with a 'Dough' section and a 'Bake' section. The list has both 'sugar' and 'brown sugar' (a substring collision).
evals.expected_output: sugar and brown sugar both linked with the right amount via longest-name-first matching; two == section == headings; 12-minute bake timer. Confidence: trusted.
assertions: sugar 100 g and brown sugar 150 g both linked correctly (no mis-tokenization)
section headings Dough and Bake present in the .cook
12-minute timer on the bake step; 0 appended; confidence = trusted

evals.name: thai-curry-split-amount
evals.prompt: Extract Thai Green Curry for norish. 400 ml coconut milk is used 'a little' in step 1 and 'the rest' in step 2 — the text never says how much of each.
evals.expected_output: full 400 ml on the main use, bare coconut milk ref on the other; no double-count. Correctly flagged LOW confidence because the split is invented (irreducible from the source).
assertions: coconut milk carries its amount in exactly one step (no double count)
all other inline amounts correct
confidence = LOW (known split-amount flagged, not hidden)

evals.name: andijviestamppot-dutch
evals.prompt: Extraheer dit Nederlandse recept voor norish met koppeling per stap: Andijviestamppot met spekjes — 1 kg aardappelen, 300 g andijvie, 150 g spekblokjes, 1 ui, 100 ml melk, zout, peper.
evals.expected_output: Dutch step text preserved; aardappelen and ui are multi-step (amount on first mention only); zout and peper bare; 20-minute kook timer. Confidence: trusted.
assertions: Dutch ingredient names anchor inline; unicode/prose preserved
aardappelen and ui carry their amount in exactly one step
zout and peper bare; 0 appended; confidence = trusted
